arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen try to muscle in as Tottenham are ‘fighting’ to sign rising star
arts.sum: On March 10th, ABC reported Tottenham Hotspur are one of the clubs ‘fighting’ to sign Rayo Vallecano’s Andrei Rațiu in the summer window. The Romania international’s fine displays at last summer’s Euros and his rise at the La Liga club this season have seen several teams, including Spurs and Bayer Leverkusen, take notice. arts.ttl: Arminia Bielefeld vs. Bayer Leverkusen: DFB Cup semi-final probable teams, match stats & LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Liga club have shown plenty of giant-killing form this season to have Xabi Alonso's 2023/24 double winners worried ahead of the teams' semi-final clash on Tuesday (kick-off: 8.45pm CEST). Bielefeld have never gone further than the semi-finals in the DFB Cup. They last reached the final four in 2004/05, where they lost to Bayern, and again in 2014/15, where they were pipped by Wolfsburg .

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham 4th, Alexander Isak 16th, Mohamed Salah 88th - The 100 most valuable players in the world
arts.sum: As spring bursts into season, Transfermarkt released its latest market value updates in March to reward those who have been in exceptional form, and also adjust market values for many other reasons...

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen keep their title hopes alive with victory over Bochum
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen defeated Bochum 3-1 in the Matchday 27 opener, with goals from Aleix García, Victor Boniface, and Amine Adli securing a vital three points for Xabi Alonso's men as they look to chase down league leaders Bayern Munich. Aleix García opened the scoring with a sensational strike, at a point where the hosts were struggling to break Bochum down.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso hopes to repeat Granit Xhaka transfer trick with forgotten Arsenal man
arts.sum: Jakub Kiwior could be headed to Bundesliga outfit Bayer Leverkusen as Xabi Alonso faces a mass exodus of departures in the summer. While much of the attention around Arsenal in this summer’s transfer window will be on their new arrivals, a key element of their strategy will also be managing departures.
